# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Pull Request Build

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, edited, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set PR metadata
        id: pr
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "title<<EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "body<<EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "EOF" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Building PR: ${{ steps.pr.outputs.title }}"
          echo "Description:"
          echo "${{ steps.pr.outputs.body }}"

      - name: Create commit message
        id: commit_message
        shell: bash
        run: |
          TITLE="${{ steps.pr.outputs.title }}"
          SAFE_TITLE=$(echo "$TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g' | sed 's/^ *//;s/ *$//')
          echo "message=Deploy: ${SAFE_TITLE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Send build notification
        run: |
          echo "Notification title: ${{ steps.pr.outputs.title }}"
          echo "Notification description: ${{ steps.pr.outputs.body }}"
          echo "Commit message: ${{ steps.commit_message.outputs.message }}"
